LanguageData.Ammo_8x50mmRMannlicher_FMJ.label: 8x50mmR Mannlicher (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_8x50mmRMannlicher_FMJ.description: Rimmed rifle cartridge found mostly in outdated bolt-action firearms.

LanguageData.Ammo_8x50mmRMannlicher_Incendiary.descri: Rimmed rifle cartridge found mostly in outdated bolt-action firearms.

LanguageData.Ammo_8x50mmRMannlicher_HE.description: Rimmed rifle cartridge found mostly in outdated bolt-action firearms.
